<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Feuer-Schlange]][[hak:Tên-sṳ]][[ja:丁巳]][[ko:정사 (간지)]][[vi:Đinh Tỵ]][[za:Dingceih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-sū]][[zh-yue:丁巳]][[zh:丁巳]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Feuer-Schlange]][[hak:Tên-sṳ]][[ja:丁巳]][[ko:정사 (간지)]][[vi:Đinh Tỵ]][[za:Dingceih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-sū]][[zh-yue:丁巳]][[zh:丁巳]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Feuer-Schlange]][[hak:Tên-sṳ]][[ja:丁巳]][[ko:정사 (간지)]][[vi:Đinh Tỵ]][[za:Dingceih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-sū]][[zh-yue:丁巳]][[zh:丁巳]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Snake|kanji=丁巳|romaji=hinoto mi|onyomi=teishi|p=dīsì|w=ting-ssu|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ sɨ|y=deng1 si6|j=deng1 si6|ci=tɛŋ siː|mc=tæŋ si|oc-bs=tæŋ si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Snake (丁巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: teiji
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongsa (정사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Tỵ

<!--
==
* Yin Fire Snake (丁巳) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 sei3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: ひのとみ (hinoto-mi)
***Onyomi: ていかのみ (teika-no-mi)
***Onyomi: ていび (teibi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): jeongsa
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Tỵ

-->
==Years of Yin Fire Snake==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 57 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Fire Snake (丁巳)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 57|en|AD 57|WD=Q30969|lt=57 AD|1=AD 57}}
* {{ill|AD 117|en|AD 117|WD=Q24444|lt=117 AD|1=AD 117}}
* {{ill|177|en|177|WD=Q33193|lt=177 AD|1=177}}
* {{ill|237|en|237|WD=Q30750|lt=237 AD|1=237}}
* {{ill|297|en|297|WD=Q33553|lt=297 AD|1=297}}
* {{ill|357|en|357|WD=Q33897|lt=357 AD|1=357}}
* {{ill|417|en|417|WD=Q32695|lt=417 AD|1=417}}
* {{ill|477|en|477|WD=Q24851|lt=477 AD|1=477}}
* {{ill|537|en|537|WD=Q31014|lt=537 AD|1=537}}
* {{ill|597|en|597|WD=Q31459|lt=597 AD|1=597}}
* {{ill|657|en|657|WD=Q31090|lt=657 AD|1=657}}
* {{ill|717|en|717|WD=Q23532|lt=717 AD|1=717}}
* {{ill|AD 777|en|AD 777|WD=Q30714|lt=777 AD|1=AD 777}}
* {{ill|837|en|837|WD=Q25093|lt=837 AD|1=837}}
* {{ill|897|en|897|WD=Q30468|lt=897 AD|1=897}}
* {{ill|957|en|957|WD=Q23711|lt=957 AD|1=957}}
|
* {{ill|1017|en|1017|WD=Q19249|lt=1017 AD|1=1017}}
* {{ill|1077|en|1077|WD=Q19441|lt=1077 AD|1=1077}}
* {{ill|1137|en|1137|WD=Q19602|lt=1137 AD|1=1137}}
* {{ill|1197|en|1197|WD=Q19749|lt=1197 AD|1=1197}}
* {{ill|1257|en|1257|WD=Q5504|lt=1257 AD|1=1257}}
* {{ill|1317|en|1317|WD=Q5745|lt=1317 AD|1=1317}}
* {{ill|1377|en|1377|WD=Q6289|lt=1377 AD|1=1377}}
* {{ill|1437|en|1437|WD=Q6374|lt=1437 AD|1=1437}}
* {{ill|1497|en|1497|WD=Q6702|lt=1497 AD|1=1497}}
* {{ill|1557|en|1557|WD=Q6595|lt=1557 AD|1=1557}}
* {{ill|1617|en|1617|WD=Q6798|lt=1617 AD|1=1617}}
* {{ill|1677|en|1677|WD=Q7631|lt=1677 AD|1=1677}}
* {{ill|1737|en|1737|WD=Q6993|lt=1737 AD|1=1737}}
* {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797 AD|1=1797}}
* {{ill|1857|en|1857|WD=Q7680|lt=1857 AD|1=1857}}
* {{ill|1917|en|1917|WD=Q2092|lt=1917 AD|1=1917}}
* {{ill|1977|en|1977|WD=Q2481|lt=1977 AD|1=1977}}
|
* {{ill|2037 AD|ja|2037年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2037|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2037 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2097 AD|ja|2097年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2097|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2097 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2090年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=2090s|WD=Q845811}}
* {{ill|2157 AD|ja|2157年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2157|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2157 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2217 AD|ja|2217年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2217|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2217 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2277 AD|ja|2277年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2277|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2277 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2337 AD|ja|2337年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2337|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2337 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2397 AD|ja|2397年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2397|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2397 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2457 AD|ja|2457年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2457|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2457 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 25世紀|1=25th century|WD=Q49839}}
* {{ill|2517 AD|ja|2517年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2517|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2517 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2577 AD|ja|2577年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2577|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2577 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2637 AD|ja|2637年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2637|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2637 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2697 AD|ja|2697年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2697|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2697 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2757 AD|ja|2757年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2757|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2757 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2817 AD|ja|2817年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2817|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2817 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2877 AD|ja|2877年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2877|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2877 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2937 AD|ja|2937年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2937|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2937 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2997 AD|ja|2997年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2997|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2997 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yin Fire Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Snake==
=== 選日 ===
The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Sin-chá]]
[[zh-yue:辛酉]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Fire Snake|qq=ja|丁巳|version=84123850|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Sin-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Holt-Hahnvi]]
[[de:Yin Fire Snake]]

[[ja:丁巳]]
[[zh:丁巳]]
[[ko:정사 (간지)]]
[[fr:Serpent de feu]]
[[de:Feuer-Schlange]]

[[af:Houthaan (astrologie)]]
[[de:Holz-Hahneen]]
[[en:Wood Rooster]]
[[fr:Coq de boisboishak]]
[[it:Sin-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:신유]]
[[vi:Ất Dậu]]
[[za:Sincceij]]
[[zh:辛酉]]
[[ar:Yin Fire Snake]]

<!--Yin Fire Snake--><!--Yin Fire Snake-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurslang (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Dĭng-sê̤ṳ]]
[[hak:Tên-sṳ]]
[[vi:Đinh Tỵ]]
[[za:Dingceih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-sū]]
[[zh-yue:丁巳]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Vuurslang (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Dĭng-sê̤ṳ]]
[[hak:Tên-sṳ]]
[[vi:Đinh Tỵ]]
[[za:Dingceih]]
[[zh-min-nan:Teng-sū]]
[[zh-yue:丁巳]]
{{wikidata link|Q905311}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
